name: Peanut Butter Snaps
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:30
Cream the butter; gradually add sugars, beating well at medium speed of an electric mixer. Add eggs, mixing well. Combine flour, baking soda, and salt; stir into the creamed mixture until smooth. Stir in peanut butter and vanilla. Chill dough for at least 1 hour. Shape dough into 1-inch balls. Place on ungreased cookie sheets. Bake at 375 degrees for 10 to 12 minutes. Let cookies cool slightly before removing from cookie sheets. Cool on wire racks. Yield: about 7 dozen.
